banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock filer: a private buyer purchasing a used car from a private seller, transferring the vehicle's registration online via voertuigoverschrijven.rdw.nl. The licence plate, tenaamstellingscode, and every other identifying detail below are fabricated test data, not a real vehicle or identity record.

collectedValues.label: Are you 18 years old or older?
Are you registered in the Basic Registration of Persons (BRP) with a residence or mailing address in the Netherlands?
Do you have a valid identity document?
Do you have the DigiD app with ID-check activated?
Does the seller have the valid registration card (or temporary document number) and the complete, valid tenaamstellingscode?
collectedValues.sourceRef: RDW 'Kenteken voertuig overschrijven' — seller document condition

collectedValues.label: Licence plate number (kenteken)
collectedValues.sourceRef: RDW 'Kenteken voertuig overschrijven' — buyer enters the vehicle's kenteken

collectedValues.label: Declaration: the vehicle will be covered by valid WA (third-party liability) insurance in your name from the moment of registration

attestation: documents[].transferFee (EUR 13.10) — a mock-scenario note only; no payment was made or attempted, since this schema does not submit the transfer.
safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (nl/rdw/vehicle-ownership-transfer). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to RDW or any government system, and the licence plate, tenaamstellingscode, and every other value above are fabricated example data, not a real vehicle or identity record — RDW's online transfer service requires a genuine DigiD login with ID-check and has no public test/sandbox mode, so this schema's author did not attempt to exercise the live wizard end to end (see VERIFICATION.md). A human (the buyer) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize submission through RDW's own channel (https://www.rdw.nl) before this transfer is filed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
